events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Sir Richard Starkey, known professionally as Ringo Starr, the legendary drummer for The Beatles, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on drums or vocals?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic lead guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Birthday Rock Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to rock royalty, Brian May! What's your all-time favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Michael Philip Jagger, the charismatic frontman of The Rolling Stones, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Birthday Rock Icon
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones track for a real energy boost?

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' famously being the first music video ever aired.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember when MTV actually played music videos? On this day in 1981, the channel launched, forever changing how we consume music. 'Video Killed The Radio Star' was fittingly the first played.

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, featuring classics like 'Live Forever' and 'Supersonic'.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years ago today, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game for Britpop. What's your standout track from this iconic debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began in 1969
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, billed as '3 Days of Peace & Music', kicked off on this day in 1969 in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: On this day in 1969, half a million people gathered for Woodstock – an iconic moment of peace, music, and mud. Which legendary performance do you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of the 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who passed away in 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley on the anniversary of his passing. His music, style, and legend continue to influence generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the rock 'n' roll icon, Chrissie Hynde! Her powerful voice and attitude continue to inspire. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles' eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', featuring the iconic zebra crossing cover, was released in the UK on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. From 'Come Together' to the medley, it's a masterpiece. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman and solo artist Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite tune from the Burnage legend, from Oasis to his solo career?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' single released
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic and globally resonant single 'Imagine' was released on this day in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years ago, John Lennon released 'Imagine', a song that continues to inspire peace and unity worldwide. What does this timeless anthem mean to you?

events.title: Apple unveiled the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple introduced the very first iPod to the world on this day in 2001, promising '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: 25 years ago today, Apple unveiled the iPod, revolutionising how we listen to music. Who remembers their first iPod, and how many songs did you cram onto it?

events.title: It's James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today marks James Bond Day, celebrating the anniversary of the world premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred) to 007. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today marks what would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' co-founder, singer, and songwriter, John Lennon.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His vision and music continue to resonate globally. What's your favourite Lennon lyric?
